summary: Iteration 36: Universal App Architecture with Split-Brain Routing - All features verified. Backend 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend tests passed with 2 bug fixes applied. Login page shows Personal Mode (email+password), SKAdmin→/dashboard, staff user→/heva-ops/shifts. Terminal PIN screen works with numpad, PIN dots, admin settings. Settings > Security has Device Registration card. Settings > User Management has email field and capabilities checkboxes.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being 0 or -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after data loads

critical_code_review_comments: Login page now shows Personal Mode only (email/username + password form) - no PIN pad toggle
Staff user 'user' login navigates to /heva-ops/shifts (Heva Ops workspace)
POST /api/auth/login accepts email OR username in the username field
POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin with pin '1234' and restaurant_id 'rest_demo_1' returns verified:true
POST /api/auth/pin-login returns capabilities array in response
POST /api/attendance/clock accepts entry_source field (mobile_app or pos_terminal)
Settings > Security tab shows 'Device Registration' card with 'Register as POS Terminal' button
Settings > User Management > Add Staff form has Email field (required) and Access & Capabilities checkboxes
Available capabilities are filtered by active business modules (POS Access, KDS Access, Clock In/Out, Manage Rota)
Staff list shows email and capability badges for each member
Creating a new staff member with email and capabilities saves correctly via POST /api/restaurant/staff
Terminal PIN pad screen has numpad, PIN dots display, and admin settings icon
POS screen logout button shows 'Lock' text when in terminal mode
seed_data_creation: Created test staff member test_staff_1775934819 with email and capabilities for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 verified Universal App Architecture with Split-Brain routing. Key changes: (1) Login page is now Personal Mode only - email/username + password form, no PIN pad toggle. (2) Terminal PIN screen is separate at /terminal, accessed when localStorage has 'heva_terminal' key. (3) Staff capabilities system: pos.access, workforce.clock_in, kds.access, workforce.manage_rota. (4) Settings > Security has Device Registration card for terminal mode. (5) Settings > User Management has email field (required) and capabilities checkboxes. (6) Attendance clock endpoint accepts entry_source field (mobile_app or pos_terminal) - geofencing skipped for pos_terminal. Bug fixes applied: (1) Fixed error handling in staff creation to properly display validation errors, (2) Fixed form data cleanup to convert empty strings to null for optional numeric fields.

login_personal_mode.evidence: Login page shows email/username + password form only, no PIN pad

auth_login_email_or_username.evidence: Backend test passed - POST /api/auth/login accepts email OR username

verify_manager_pin.evidence: Backend test passed - POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin with pin '1234' returns verified:true

pin_login_capabilities.evidence: Backend test passed - POST /api/auth/pin-login returns capabilities array

attendance_entry_source.evidence: Backend test passed - POST /api/attendance/clock accepts entry_source field

settings_security_terminal_registration.evidence: Settings > Security tab shows Device Registration card with Register as POS Terminal button

settings_staff_email_capabilities.evidence: Add Staff form has Email field (required) and Access & Capabilities checkboxes

capabilities_filtered_by_modules.evidence: POS Access, KDS Access, Clock In/Out, Manage Rota checkboxes shown based on active modules

staff_list_email_badges.evidence: Staff list shows email and capability badges (pos, workforce) for each member

create_staff_with_email_capabilities.evidence: Created test_staff_1775934819 with email and capabilities successfully

terminal_pin_screen.evidence: Terminal PIN screen has numpad (0-9, DEL), PIN dots display, admin settings icon

pos_lock_button_terminal_mode.evidence: POS screen shows 'Lock' button instead of 'Logout' when in terminal mode

bugs_fixed.issue: Error handling in staff creation was trying to render validation error object as React child
bugs_fixed.fix: Added proper error message extraction from Pydantic validation error array

bugs_fixed.issue: Form was sending empty strings for optional numeric fields causing 422 validation errors
bugs_fixed.fix: Added data cleanup to convert empty strings to null for optional fields before API call
